rows.label: qev091207_MSG0001
rows.name: What, you forget what I asked you to do?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091207_MSG0002
rows.name:
Your mission was to secure the new
resource they found out in White Woods.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091207_MSG0003
rows.name:
Stay sharp out there—that place is home to some
real nasty indigens. I know it's not an easy task,
but I have faith you'll get it done together.[ST:wait ]
